feed.title: QR-based signing flow payloads in Miniscript context

entry.title: QR-based signing flow payloads in Miniscript context
entry.summary: The email discussion highlights concerns about the potential maintenance challenges associated with a particular system or project. The phrase "it’ll be a pain to maintain" suggests that there are anticipated difficulties in managing and keeping the system operational over time. This might involve issues related to the complexity of the technology, the need for frequent updates, or potential bugs that could arise as the system evolves. Such challenges emphasize the importance of considering long-term sustainability and ease of maintenance during the initial design and development phases to mitigate future problems.
